diagrams.title: Fixed Partitioning Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows memory divided into fixed-size partitions with internal fragmentation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize internal fragmentation in fixed partitioning

diagrams.title: Variable Partitioning with Holes
diagrams.description: Shows dynamic partitions with free holes between allocated blocks
diagrams.purpose: Understand external fragmentation and hole concept

diagrams.title: Memory Allocation Algorithm Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison showing how different algorithms allocate a 15KB process to memory holes of sizes [5KB, 30KB, 20KB, 10KB]
elements: Next Fit: Allocates to 30KB (if previous was 5KB)
diagrams.purpose: Compare algorithm behavior with same memory state

diagrams.title: Memory Compaction Process
diagrams.description: Shows before and after memory state during compaction
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how compaction solves external fragmentation
